arts.ttl: Analysis: How can Son get back to his best for Spurs?
arts.sum: Son still has six goals and seven assists to his name – with double figures still a possibility for both – but his overall form has been less consistent than in previous years. You can see this in the graphics below, comparing Son's shot maps from 2021/22 and last season with the current campaign.

arts.ttl: Man United's Marcus Rashford 'makes feelings clear' on next move after Aston Villa loan switch
arts.sum: Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford reportedly still hopes to complete a 'dream switch' to Barcelona during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Lisandro Martinez issues statement on injury as Man Utd star undergoes surgery
arts.sum: Manchester United defender Lisandro Martinez is out for the remainder of the season after undergoing successful surgery to repair the ACL injury he sustained earlier this month
